{"id":1427681551,"question_id":26,"lang":"cpp","lang_name":"C++","time":"4 days, 3 hours","timestamp":1729372357,"status":14,"status_display":"Time Limit Exceeded","runtime":"N/A","url":"/submissions/detail/1427681551/","is_pending":"Not Pending","title":"Remove Duplicates from Sorted Array","memory":"N/A","code":"class Solution {\npublic:\n    int removeDuplicates(vector<int>& nums) {\n        int size = nums.size();\n        sort(nums.begin(), nums.end());\n        for(int i=0;i<size-1;i++) {\n            while(nums[i] == nums[i+1]) {\n                nums.erase(nums.begin() + i);\n                size--;\n            }\n        }\n        return nums.size();\n    }\n};","compare_result":"","title_slug":"remove-duplicates-from-sorted-array","has_notes":false,"flag_type":1}
